name: 04-14-files-panel
title: Files Panel: file tree, viewer with syntax highlighting, markdown preview
description: Add Files panel to left sidebar below Projects. ListTree icon. File tree view in active panel, file content viewer with syntax highlighting (hljs), markdown preview support.
creator: tincopper
notes: Implementation complete. Rust compiles cleanly. TypeScript needs pnpm install to verify (codemirror packages already in package.json).
